creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems to fail during a poudriere build right at the end with this error:

byte-compiling /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/py-zeep/work-py27/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/zeep/tornado/bindings.py to bindings.pyc
writing byte-compilation script '/tmp/tmpuxt1JR.py'
/usr/local/bin/python2.7 -O /tmp/tmpuxt1JR.py
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/zeep/asyncio/transport.py", line 62
    async def _load_remote_data_async():
            ^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax

  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/zeep/asyncio/bindings.py", line 8
    async def send(self, client, options, operation, args, kwargs):
            ^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax

removing /tmp/tmpuxt1JR.py

This leads to most of the files from pkg-plist not to be installed. Can you try to test the build in poudriere ?
